_comment: Current system predictions, one per case id in ground_truth.json. OVERWRITE this each analysis run, then run scripts/kb/score_weights.py. Fields: predicted_kg (number, or null if abstained), unit, confidence (0..1), abstained (bool), method. Rule: if the self-consistency gate fails you MUST set abstained=true and predicted_kg=null -- never emit a confident number you are not sure of. Seeded with the corrected final reads (post-learning baseline = should score 100% on scorable cases with 0 confident-wrong).

predictions.method: read DOMYOS 2.5kg flat face x2, no handle
offset loading frame; inner-vs-outer per end -> 2kg+1kg mixed x2 ends
count empty holes from top = 3 (13,21,29) -> pin plate 4; 13+8x3
count empty holes from top = 5 (13,21,29,37,45) -> pin plate 6; 13+8x5
plate denom 2kg read; bar weight unverified -> abstain on total
lever rig: 10kg plate mass read but working resistance ratio unknown -> abstain
